titleStmt.title: SII 23.148: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 148. (A.R. No. 148 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Rock-cut cave—on the east wall of the same maṇḍapa

summary.p: This belongs to the reign of the Vijayanagara king Vīrapratāpa Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya and is dated in Śaka 1471, Saumya, Āni, 13, Monday, [śu], prathamā, Mūlā, corresponding to A.D. 1549, June 10. It registers an endowment of land at Nāvaṟkuḍi, which was their kāṇiyāṭchi, by the ūravar of Karaiyūr in Teṉ-Kōṉāḍu a division of Olliyūr-kūṟṟam in Kaḍalaḍaiyād-ilaṅgaikoṇḍa-Śōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, for the early morning service of the god in the temple at Tiruppūvalaikkuḍi in Poṉṉamarāpati-nāḍu as the gift of Tyāgaṇa-Nāyakkar Peddappa-Nāyakkar-Ayyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu sva sti śrī . śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉimicurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva Ariya
rāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa ṉāṭu ko
ṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ tulukkartaḻa vipāṭaṉ tulukkar
mokaran taviḻttāṉ pūṟuvateṟṣaṇa paccima Uttira catta camuttirāti pati Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaru
ḷiya Irācātirāca Irācaparamecura śrīvirapiṟatāpa śrī catāciva tevamakā rāyar piṟituvirācciyam paṇ
ṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 7 10 1- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa cavumiyavaruṣam
Āṉi ṭṭa 10 3 comavāramum piṟatamaiyum peṟṟa mula naṟkṣattirattu nāḷ poṉṉamarāpatināṭṭu vaṭapaṟṟu nāyaṉār
tiruppūvālaikkuṭiyuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Olliyūrkkūṟṟattut
teṉkoṉāṭṭuk karaiyūr Ū(r)rkku camaitta Ūravarom tevatāṉap piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta
paṭi Ayyaṉ tiyākaṇanāyakkar pettappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ taṉmam Āka Attāram koṉeriyappar
muṉṉāka ciṟukālai cantikku niṟṟappaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi Amutu paṭiyum muṉṟu tiruviḷakku
paṭikku Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṭciyāṉa nāvaṟkuṭi perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻ pāṟkellai Ara
laikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pūvālaikkuṭi Ellaikku vaṭakkum mel pāṟ
kellai cāttaṉūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai caṅkaraṉ kuṟuccikku teṟkum Āka
Icaitta nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nāṟpāṟkellai māvaṭai maravaṭai ku
Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cakala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāka Iṉ ṉāyaṉāṟku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi
Aruḷumpaṭikku cantirātiṟṟai varaiyum A
ḷakkakkaṭavārākavum Inta taṉmattukku Iyātām Oruvar Akitam coṉṉaper keṅkaikkaraiyi
le kārāmpacuvaiyum pirāmaṇaṉaiyum koṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavāṉākavum Ippaṭikku tiruppūvālaikkuṭi
tiruccirāppaḷḷiyuṭaiyāṉ kāraiyūr veḷār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
